summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM - backend APIs working well (61.5% success), admin panel UI functional but has session management issues, cabinet pages require separate authentication

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 404 - Payment flow not found for deal blocked

ui_bugs.issue: Authentication session not persisting across page navigation - direct URLs redirect to login
Cabinet pages (/cabinet/shipping, /cabinet/invoices) require separate authentication system

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access customers page or team lead panel due to session loss

design_issues.issue: Інтеграції tab not found under НАЛАШТУВАННЯ - only Парсер and Система available

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with BIBI Cars branding

critical_fixes: Fix admin panel session management - authentication tokens not persisting across page navigation
Implement proper routing for /admin/customers and /admin/team-lead pages
Add Інтеграції tab under Settings > НАЛАШТУВАННЯ section
Fix cabinet authentication system for /cabinet/shipping and /cabinet/invoices pages
backend_fixes: Ensure proper data seeding for analytics and packages endpoints
testing_notes: Backend APIs are mostly functional with good authentication
Admin UI design is excellent and professional
Main issue is frontend session/routing management
Cabinet section appears to be separate application with own auth
